revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{documentation subpage}}</noinclude>
{{High-use}}
This template removes bold and italic formatting from a text string.

==Usage==
* {{tlx|normal|{{var|text-string}}}}
To display text ({{var|text-string}}) at normal font-weight and without italics within a context where the default font-weight is '''bold''' and/or the default font-style is ''italic''.

==TemplateData==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Input text",
			"description": "Text to present not bolded or italicized",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		}
	},
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata>

==See also==
* [[Template:Nobold]]
* [[Template:Noitalic]]
* [[Template:Nocaps]]

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!--Categories-->
[[Category:Text-specific formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{documentation subpage}}</noinclude>
{{High-use}}
This template removes bold and italic formatting from a text string.

==Usage==
* {{tlx|normal|{{var|text-string}}}}
To display text ({{var|text-string}}) at normal font-weight and without italics within a context where the default font-weight is '''bold''' and/or the default font-style is ''italic''.

==TemplateData==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Input text",
			"description": "Text to present not bolded or italicized",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		}
	},
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata>

==See also==
* [[Template:Nobold]]
* [[Template:Noitalic]]
* [[:en:Template:Nocaps|Template:Nocaps]]

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!--Categories-->
[[Category:Text-specific formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{documentation subpage}}</noinclude>
{{High-use}}
This template removes bold and italic formatting from a text string.

==Usage==
* {{tlx|normal|{{var|text-string}}}}
To display text ({{var|text-string}}) at normal font-weight and without italics within a context where the default font-weight is '''bold''' and/or the default font-style is ''italic''.

==TemplateData==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Input text",
			"description": "Text to present not bolded or italicized",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		}
	},
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata>

==See also==
* [[Template:Nobold]]
* [[Template:Noitalic]]
* [[:en:Template:Nocaps|Template:Nocaps]]

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!--Categories-->
[[Category:Text-specific formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{documentation subpage}}</noinclude>
{{High-use}}
This template removes bold and italic formatting from a text string.

==Usage==
* {{tlx|normal|{{var|text-string}}}}
To display text ({{var|text-string}}) at normal font-weight and without italics within a context where the default font-weight is '''bold''' and/or the default font-style is ''italic''.

==TemplateData==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Input text",
			"description": "Text to present not bolded or italicized",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true

	},
	"format": "inline"

==See also==

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{documentation subpage}}</noinclude>
{{High-use}}
This template removes bold and italic formatting from a text string.

==Usage==
* {{tlx|normal|{{var|text-string}}}}
To display text ({{var|text-string}}) at normal font-weight and without italics within a context where the default font-weight is '''bold''' and/or the default font-style is ''italic''.

	"params": {
		"1": {

			"description": "Text to present not bolded or italicized",

}}</includeonly>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23518067722|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{documentation subpage}}</noinclude>
{{High-use}}
This template removes bold and italic formatting from a text string.

==Usage==
* {{tlx|normal|{{var|text-string}}}}
To display text ({{var|text-string}}) at normal font-weight and without italics within a context where the default font-weight is '''bold''' and/or the default font-style is ''italic''.

==TemplateData==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Input text",
			"description": "Text to present not bolded or italicized",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		}
	},
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata>

==See also==
* [[Template:Nobold]]
* [[Template:Noitalic]]
* [[:en:Template:Nocaps|Template:Nocaps]]

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!--Categories-->

}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Text-specific formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{documentation subpage}}</noinclude>
{{High-use}}
This template removes bold and italic formatting from a text string.

==Usage==
* {{tlx|normal|{{var|text-string}}}}
To display text ({{var|text-string}}) at normal font-weight and without italics within a context where the default font-weight is '''bold''' and/or the default font-style is ''italic''.

==TemplateData==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Input text",
			"description": "Text to present not bolded or italicized",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true

</noinclude>
